Treasure & Curse

How to play

Goal: Force your opponent to run out of cards.

On your turn: Tap your deck (blue) to flip the top card onto the Treasure Pile. The AI (orange) goes automatically.

The Curse: When a face card is played, the opponent gets chances to flip a face card back — 1 for a Jack, 2 for a Queen, 3 for a King. Succeed and the curse chains; fail and the face-card player claims the pile.

Combo: If two non-face cards of the same rank are played in a row, the Treasure Pile glows green — tap it fast to claim it!

Points: Each card is worth its number x10 (Ace=10, Jack=110, Queen=120, King=130).

Press "New Game" to start.
